column13: Lead 372 — Otter.ai (Sam Liang, Founder + CEO). Tier-1 ai_meeting_infrastructure 5th-sibling, extending the canonical meeting-capture-and-AI-agent cohort after Recall.ai 368 + Fathom 369 + Grain 370 + Fireflies.ai 371. Otter.ai is the AI meeting assistant surface for live transcription + Otter Notetaker + Otter Assistant + Otter Channels + Otter Sales Insights + AI Summary + auto-capture across Zoom + Google Meet + Microsoft Teams + Webex + in-person meetings + phone calls + CRM sync. privacy@otter.ai verified live 2026-07-16. Otter.ai founded 2018 Los Altos CA by Sam Liang (Founder + CEO, ex-Google distinguished engineer who co-created Google Speech + Google Glass + Google Maps). HQ Los Altos CA + Mountain View CA. Backed $70M+ from Spectrum Equity + Horizon Ventures + GGV Capital. Customers: 10M+ users.
